title: The Hidden Impact of Pharmacy Supply Chain Disruption on Patient Care | Pharmacy Times
snippet: When essential medical consumables ... supply chain, it increases health risks as patients may be forced to delay treatment or seek lesser treatment options.7 · The common argument during supply shortages and delays is that pharmacists simply need to prescribe alternatives. In practice, treatment substitutions come with their own risks and regulatory hurdles that again can lead to compromised patient outcomes. During disruptions, it’s not the manufacturers or the logistics teams that ...
